entry.title: Managing affiliate finances: From spreadsheets to scalability
entry.summary: "Everything is based on money for money." That's how our Finance Management course at Business Academy started, and it couldn't be more true for affiliate marketing. While most affiliate guides focus on traffic and conversions, they rarely mention the complex financial infrastructure needed to make it all work. Here's how we turned our casino affiliate project from a simple spreadsheet into a scalable financial system.
